title: uva-ursi montana
intro: Uva-ursi montana, also known as bearberry or kinnikinnick, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the mountainous regions of North America. Its medicinal properties are derived from its leaves and berries, which contain arbutin, a compound with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of uva-ursi montana include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a popular herbal remedy for kidney stones and other urinary issues. Uva-ursi montana can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
